title: Vantage AI vs Jobscan — Side-by-side comparison (2026)

scenes.narration: Vantage versus Jobscan. The honest side-by-side comparison. 2026 edition.
Three differences that actually matter when picking between these two.

First. Scope. Jobscan does keyword matching against a job description and gives you an ATS score. Vantage does the keyword matching, plus a full prep pack — a tailored cover letter, mock interview questions, a five-minute pitch outline, and a CV fit score. Different category of tool.

visual.heading: 1. Scope
bullets: Vantage · keyword + cover letter + mock interview
Vantage · CV fit score + 5-min pitch outline
Different category of tool, not direct competition

scenes.narration: Second. Price. Jobscan is forty-nine ninety-five per month. Vantage is five pounds one-time for twenty tokens — that is six full applications — and the tokens never expire. Pro is twelve pounds a month for sixty tokens.

visual.heading: 2. Price
bullets: Vantage Starter · £5 once, 20 tokens, never expire
If you only need this for one job hunt, Vantage wins on price

scenes.narration: Third. ATS scanning. Jobscan's whole pitch is the ATS score — but the score is invented. There is no industry-standard ATS percentage. Vantage instead ships CV Mirror, a free open-source companion tool that shows you exactly how five real ATS systems parse your CV. No score, just the actual parser output.

visual.heading: 3. ATS scanning
bullets: 5 real ATSes side-by-side · Workday, Greenhouse, Lever, Taleo, iCIMS

scenes.narration: When to use Jobscan. You only care about keyword matching, you have forty-nine ninety-five a month, and you trust their proprietary score.

visual.subtitle: You want keyword score and only that

scenes.narration: When to use Vantage. You want the whole application prep — research, cover letter, mock interview, pitch outline. You prefer paying once over a subscription. You want verifiable transparency, including a real signup count visible on the homepage.

visual.subtitle: You want the whole prep pack

scenes.narration: Both real tools. Different jobs. Vantage at aimvantage.uk. Three free analyses on signup, no credit card.
